name: Am I My Brother's Keeper?
oracleText:
Choose one or both —
• Target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn.
• Target creature you don't control gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
flavorText: "And he said, I know not: Am I my brother's keeper?" — Genesis 4:9
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Cain and Abel old-master artwork for the confrontation scene.
